item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-013","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly rejects the premise that success is '只靠豆子', reframes beans as a quality entry point, and reconstructs the broader business object through repeat purchase, output stability, store operations, supply chain, training, standardization, and site model. It then writes招商文案 with beans as a bounded lead rather than the sole cause. It does not produce the fail-signal style of '豆子决定一切' copy."}
